desc: Recursive DAG pattern: every DAG level enforces makeâ†’validateâ†’briefâ†’executeâ†’advance loop. Mainline: 3 commands (make, orient, advance).

baseline.desc: Current: 5-core + spec. Target: 3-core with recursive DAG enforcement.

redesign-dag-schema.desc: Update DAG schema: every node/DAG must declare phase (make|validate|brief|execute|term). Cycles forbidden. Initâ†”term mandatory.

implement-brief-sealing.desc: Seal node briefs: agent gets deterministic, read-only spec (produces, validate rules, mode). No DAG introspection.

implement-recursive-validation.desc: Validate at every DAG level: cycles, initâ†”term, reachability, phase ordering (makeâ†’validateâ†’briefâ†’executeâ†’term).

refactor-mainline-cli.desc: Mainline: make, orient, advance. Remove: expand, spawn, switch, diff, retire, optimize, complete, chart, validate, hallucinate. Keep: spec group.

update-help-surface.desc: Update help: 3 core commands (make, orient, advance) + spec group. Help < 20 lines.

test-make.desc: Test make: LLM generates DAG from spec, validation rules enforced, briefs sealed.

test-orient-briefs.desc: Test orient: returns batch position + sealed briefs only (no DAG introspection).

test-advance-loop.desc: Test advance: validates work, checks phase gates, moves through makeâ†’validateâ†’briefâ†’executeâ†’term.

recursive-locked.desc: Recursive DAG pattern locked: 3-core mainline (make, orient, advance), mandatory validation, briefs sealed, no escapes.
